subcodes.first_line: It behooveth every soul on this Day to ponder the Cause of God and His sovereignty, and to be numbered among the fair-minded. How many [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ینبغی الیوم لکل نفس ان یتفکر فی امر الله و سلطانه و یکون من المنصفین کم من
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
